name: Eggless Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: DDMmom
Sift together flour, sugar, salt, and baking soda. Cream butter with melted chocolate. Stir the two mixtures into one batter. Add in milk and vanilla, beating thoroughly. Bake in a greased and floured 9-inch layer cake pan in a moderate oven at 350°F for 25-30 minutes, or until the cake springs back when lightly touched. Remove from the pan to a rack to cool. When cool, cut horizontally in half, and use your favorite icing.
